data.title: Securitas AB's Full-Year Report for 2025 will be released on Feb 4, 2026, at 8.00 am (CET) in Stockholm.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Securitas AB announced that they are set to release their Full-Year Report for January-December 2025 on February 4, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (CET). The report will be distributed through a press release from Cision (www.cision.se).

data.title: ADA aims for $0.46 by February after showing recovery; technical indicators suggest neutral momentum. Key resistance at $0.36.
data.description: Analysts are predicting Cardano (ADA) to reach a target of $0.46 by February as the cryptocurrency shows signs of recovery. Current technical indicators point towards neutral momentum, with a key resistance level at $0.36.

data.title: Dow gains 300+ points before earnings; Fear & Greed Index 'Neutral'. Stocks rebound after last week's losses. Company shares drop.
data.description: The latest data from the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicates an improvement in overall market sentiment, although it remains within the "Neutral" zone as of Monday. In the U.S. stock market, there was a positive trend as the Dow Jones index surged by over 300 points in the trading session. This surge comes ahead of a significant week filled with major earnings reports and the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision. Last week, stocks faced losses with the Dow dropping by 0.5% and the S&P 500 falling approximately 0.4%. Revolution Medicines Inc (NASDAQ: RVMD) experienced a notable decline of 17% on Monday after reports surfaced that Merck is no longer considering acquiring the company. Additionally, Steel Dynamics Inc (NASDAQ: STLD) reported disappointing earnings for the fourth quarter. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EQT Foundation offers breakthrough science grants worth EUR 25,000 to EUR 100,000 to reduce critical mineral dependence.
data.description: The EQT Foundation has announced the opening of applications for grants aimed at developing deep technology solutions to address the issue of critical mineral dependence in climate technologies. The grant program offered by the foundation will provide funding ranging from EUR 25,000 to EUR 100,000. The initiative aims to support innovative projects that tackle this pressing challenge. Recently launched in Stockholm on January 27, 2026, this new funding opportunity invites interested parties to submit their proposals for consideration.

data.title: Agentic automation in Europe is growing with increased sophistication; service development accelerating, says ISG.
data.description: The growth of intelligent automation in Europe is progressing, showcasing increased sophistication and rapid advancements in service and solution creation, according to ISG. The region is witnessing a noteworthy evolution in this field, with significant developments being made in artificial intelligence.

data.title: Amentum wins $730M contracts from EDF to provide services for UK nuclear reactors and Hinkley Point.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia, Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) announced winning new contracts from Électricité de France (EDF) valued at up to $730 million (£540 million). The contracts will enhance the critical solutions offered for the UK’s current nuclear reactors and support the development of a new gigawatt power station at Hinkley Point. Loren Jones, the senior vice president leading Amentum’s Energy & Environment-International business, highlighted the company’s proficiency in providing operational support for gigawatt reactors.

data.title: South Korea facing stablecoin debate with concerns over capital flows, issuer oversight, and USD risks.
data.description: The discussion on stablecoins in South Korea has hit a standstill as the central bank expresses worries about issues relating to capital flows, supervision of issuers, and risks associated with being linked to the US dollar.
